featureName: BUG-069-002: assistant HTTP capture-as-fallback is bound to the request context (r.Context()), so a client disconnect during a CaptureRoute=true turn cancels the durable capture write (Postgres INSERT + NATS publish, both ctx-honoring) and silently loses the user's prompt — violating the inviolable capture-as-fallback contract (Hard Constraint 5 / BS-001)

fixSequence.task: Author internal/assistant/httpadapter/capture_disconnect_test.go (TestHTTPAdapter_CaptureSurvivesClientDisconnect) — RED against a.capture(r.Context(), ...). Then apply the one-line fix in internal/assistant/httpadapter/adapter.go: a.capture(context.WithoutCancel(r.Context()), ...) — GREEN. Boundary: only adapter.go + the new test file. COMPLETE: RED+GREEN captured in report.md [R1][R3]; fix diff [R2].

Author the live-stack E2E / integration regression that drives a real HTTP request whose client connection is aborted mid-turn against the bound adapter + a real pipeline.Processor (Postgres + NATS), asserting the captured artifact is persisted despite the disconnect. Requires `./smackerel.sh up` + `./smackerel.sh test integration|e2e`. Then route to bubbles.validate for done-ceiling certification (scenario-specific + broader E2E regression + stress). NOT runnable in the discovery/fix session (no live stack).

completedPhaseClaimDetails.summary: chaos-hardening Round 39 probe of the assistant HTTP transport. Read the live request path: HTTPAdapter.ServeHTTP renders capture-as-fallback via a.capture(r.Context(), ...); production newAssistantHTTPCaptureFn dispatches pipeline.Processor.Process(ctx, ...) which runs a ctx-honoring Postgres INSERT (storeInitialArtifact) + NATS publish (submitForProcessing). net/http cancels r.Context() on client disconnect -> the capture write aborts with context.Canceled and newAssistantHTTPCaptureFn only slog.Errors it -> the user's prompt is silently lost. Finding F-069-CHAOS39-CAPTURE-CTX-CANCEL (MEDIUM): violates inviolable capture-as-fallback (Hard Constraint 5 / BS-001). Telegram unaffected (long-poll background ctx).

Scenario-first: authored internal/assistant/httpadapter/capture_disconnect_test.go (TestHTTPAdapter_CaptureSurvivesClientDisconnect) which cancels the request context before the capture write and asserts capture invoked with a live ctx + prompt/user preserved. RED captured (capture ran with a cancelled context (err=context canceled), exit 1). Applied the fix in internal/assistant/httpadapter/adapter.go: a.capture(r.Context(), ...) -> a.capture(context.WithoutCancel(r.Context()), ...) with an explanatory comment. GREEN captured (PASS, exit 0). Change confined to adapter.go (1 line + comment) + the new test file. context already imported; Go 1.25.10 supports context.WithoutCancel.

Unit-level regression complete. Full internal/assistant/httpadapter package green (ok ... 0.157s): existing TestChaos069, TestHTTPAssistantTurnGoldenContractV1, TestHTTPAdapterTranslatesTextTurnToAssistantMessage, TestHTTPAdapter_Validate*, TestTransportHintIsClosedVocabularyAndTelemetryOnly + the new regression — no FAIL, capture invoked exactly once unchanged. regression-quality-guard.sh --bugfix internal/assistant/httpadapter/capture_disconnect_test.go: adversarial signal detected, 0 violations (exit 0). PENDING: live-stack E2E regression (disconnect-race against real pipeline) requires `./smackerel.sh up` — not runnable in this session; routed to bubbles.test/bubbles.validate for done-ceiling certification.

Delta = adapter.go capture call (1 line) + new test file. httpadapter package green; no behavioral change to non-capture or Telegram paths; capture invocation count unchanged (exactly once per CaptureRoute=true turn). No tests deleted/skipped/weakened. REGRESSION_FREE for the touched surface (unit scope).

Security/compliance audit of the changed surface. Exactly one capture call site in adapter.go (line 382) now using context.WithoutCancel (grep -c context.WithoutCancel = 1) — capture-once invariant unchanged (BS-001). The 5xx no-internals-leak path (writeError ... 'assistant_turn_failed', line 368) is unchanged by the fix; TestChaos069 (asserts no 5xx internals leak) stays green. context.WithoutCancel preserves parent Values only (no auth/session leakage; capture takes an explicit userID arg, not ctx-sourced identity). No new secret/PII/financial-action surface (P10 boundary intact). No NO-DEFAULTS violation (no new config). OWASP A01/A03/A05/A07: no findings on changed code. Verdict: SECURE.

executionHistory.summary: chaos-hardening Round 39 parent-expanded (no nested runSubagent). Discovered F-069-CHAOS39-CAPTURE-CTX-CANCEL: assistant HTTP capture-as-fallback bound to r.Context() silently drops the user's prompt on client disconnect. LANDED the fix: a.capture(context.WithoutCancel(r.Context()), ...) in internal/assistant/httpadapter/adapter.go, proven by TestHTTPAdapter_CaptureSurvivesClientDisconnect adversarial unit regression (RED->GREEN) + full httpadapter package green + adversarial-signal guard green. ROUTED the remaining done-ceiling certification (live-stack E2E disconnect-race regression + broader E2E suite + stress) to bubbles.test -> bubbles.validate; not runnable in this session (no live stack). One finding, one root cause, one Scope 1 — no cherry-picking. The already-done parent spec 069 artifacts are left untouched; the finding and fix are recorded entirely in this bug packet.

blockers: Live-stack E2E regression for the client-disconnect race (real HTTP client abort against the bound adapter + real pipeline.Processor with Postgres + NATS) is not runnable in the discovery/fix session — requires `./smackerel.sh up` + `./smackerel.sh test integration|e2e`. Routed to bubbles.test.
Done-ceiling certification (scenario-specific + broader E2E regression coverage, stress coverage) pending the live-stack run. Routed to bubbles.validate.
certification.notes: Code fix is LANDED and UNIT-VERIFIED (adversarial RED->GREEN + full httpadapter package green + adversarial-signal guard green). The single-line cancellation decoupling (context.WithoutCancel) closes F-069-CHAOS39-CAPTURE-CTX-CANCEL at the adapter contract level. Full done-ceiling certification requires the live-stack E2E disconnect-race regression, which this session cannot run; status held at in_progress and routed honestly rather than fabricating E2E/stress evidence.
